'''Deela''' was a woman captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], alongside her [[Unidentified Rebel soldier (Keskin)|husband]] and [[Tepar|daughter]], during the invasion of her home planet, nine months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Captured by [[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]], her husband refused to give any information on the Alliance and stated [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] would overthrow the Empire.

{{Char-stub}}
